interfaces.name: getHomeHighlights
interfaces.description: Get homepage highlight content including upcoming services and featured events for quick navigation.

announcementText.description: Optional short welcome or announcement text for the home page.

interfaces.name: getServiceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Plan a Visit & Services page including day, time, style, and children’s age ranges.

interfaces.name: searchWorshipServices
interfaces.description: Search upcoming worship services with filters for day, time range, style, and children’s programming.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of results to return

interfaces.name: getServiceDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific worship service, including available children’s programs and teaching pastor info.

interfaces.name: addServiceToVisitPlan
interfaces.description: Add or replace the selected worship service in the current visit plan (creating a visit plan if needed).

interfaces.name: addChildrensProgramToVisitPlan
interfaces.description: Add a specific children’s program to the current visit plan, auto-linking to its worship service if needed.

interfaces.name: getCurrentVisitPlanSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the current visit plan for display in on-page panels.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Events & Calendar page.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search events for the Events & Calendar page with filters, view type, and sorting.

isSaved.description: True if event is in My Events list

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for an event including registration and save status.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Submit a registration for an event including attendee count.

parameters.name: addToMyEvents
parameters.description: If true, also save this event to My Events.

interfaces.name: saveEventToMyEvents
interfaces.description: Save an event to the single-user My Events list (creating the list if needed).

isNewlyAdded.description: False if the event was already saved.

interfaces.name: getMyEvents
interfaces.description: Get the list of events saved in the My Events / Saved Events list.

interfaces.name: removeEventFromMyEvents
interfaces.description: Remove an event from the My Events / Saved Events list.

interfaces.name: searchAvailableRooms
interfaces.description: Search for rooms available for reservation matching a date, time range, and expected group size.

interfaces.name: getRoomDetailsForReservation
interfaces.description: Get room details and default reservation context for the Room Reservation Request page.

interfaces.name: submitRoomReservationRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a request to reserve a room for a given date and time range.

interfaces.name: getSermonFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Sermons page.

interfaces.name: searchSermons
interfaces.description: Search sermons with keyword, filters, and sorting, returning cards suitable for the Sermons page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search across titles, descriptions, and tags

interfaces.name: getSermonDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific sermon for playback or a dedicated sermon page.

interfaces.name: addSermonToWatchLater
interfaces.description: Add a sermon to the single-user Watch Later playlist (creating the playlist if needed).

interfaces.name: getWatchLaterPlaylist
interfaces.description: Get the Watch Later playlist and its sermon entries.

interfaces.name: removeSermonFromWatchLater
interfaces.description: Remove a sermon from the Watch Later playlist.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Volunteer Opportunities page.

interfaces.name: searchVolunteerRoles
interfaces.description: Search volunteer roles with filters for day, time commitment, and category.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerRoleDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific volunteer role for the Volunteer Role Detail page.

interfaces.name: submitVolunteerInterest
interfaces.description: Submit an interest form for a specific volunteer role.

interfaces.name: getGivingOptions
interfaces.description: Get giving options for the Online Giving & Pledges page including funds, giving types, and frequencies.

interfaces.name: submitPledge
interfaces.description: Submit a pledge or giving commitment for a specific fund.

interfaces.name: getCareOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview content for the Care & Counseling page including care areas and featured pastors.

interfaces.name: getPastorFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for browsing pastors and counselors.

interfaces.name: searchPastors
interfaces.description: Search pastors and counselors by specialty and counseling availability flag.

isCounselor.description: If true, only show those available for counseling.

interfaces.name: getPastorProfile
interfaces.description: Get full profile details for a pastor including counseling specialties.

interfaces.name: getCounselingAvailabilityForPastor
interfaces.description: Get available counseling time slots for a pastor in a given date and optional time range.

interfaces.name: submitCounselingAppointmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a counseling appointment request for a specific pastor and availability slot.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page including mission, vision, beliefs, and key leaders.

interfaces.name: getContactAndDirections
interfaces.description: Get contact information, directions, and a summary of service times for the Contact & Directions page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general inquiry from the Contact & Directions page.

interfaces.name: getMinistriesOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview list of ministries for the Ministries Overview page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateVisitPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single-user VisitPlan object in storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedEventList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single-user SavedEventList (My Events).

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWatchLaterPlaylist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single-user WatchLaterPlaylist.

helperFunctions.name: _validateAndBuildDateTimeRange
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate date/time inputs and construct start/end datetimes for searches and reservations.
